title: Xaero's Naturalist Icons
body: # THIS RESOURCE PACK WILL SOON BE OUTDATED! ## Naturalist is beginning to roll out Xaero's compat in their newest versions, meaning this pack will no longer be needed to see icons on Xaero's minimap! :D This resource pack was kinda bad anyway lol ## **Xaero's Naturalist Icons** A resource pack that adds [Naturalist](https://modrinth.com/mod/naturalist) icons for [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap). ![Before, without the resource pack, and after, with it.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8cb7a900773c95f3add6c5260dde1f083aa969c6.png) **This is an experimental side project of mine, meaning there may be some missing icons or issues with the resource pack. If you come across any issues, please report it at [this site](https://github.com/BrenBronze/brenbronze-MC-Project-Issues-N-Suggestions/issues) or at the "Issues" link on the external resources tab. Thank you!**
